root.speaker: Syslog Keeper
root.text:
I am the Syslog Keeper. I read what just happened.

Most recent: `[INFO] tux logged in`.

warn.speaker: Syslog Keeper
warn.text:
`[WARN] Wyrdking memory low`.

We're not sure what that meant. The Wyrdking did not say.

err.speaker: Syslog Keeper
err.text:
`[ERROR] segfault in /dev/forge`.

Something fell over in the Forge. Something always is.

cron.speaker: Syslog Keeper
cron.text:
`[INFO] cron job at midnight succeeded`.

Glim flickers when I read that one. I have not asked
Glim why.

props.message:
Running scroll, left wall:

`[INFO] tux logged in`
`[INFO] cd /opt/wyrdmark/glade`
`[INFO] entered scene wyrdkin_glade`

Running scroll, right wall:

`[WARN] Wyrdking memory low`
`[INFO] cron job at midnight succeeded`
`[ERROR] segfault in /dev/forge`

Records what happens, not what should.

The Keeper says this often. The Keeper is correct.

props.open_message:
Tucked behind a long scroll — a Heart Piece. The Keeper
doesn't recall when it appeared in the log.
